## Description

Briefly describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Chore / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt` ran
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] One change = one commit
